message.content: Building the mobile login flow this sprint. It posts to /login and reads the session cookie back to keep the user signed in — that's the contract the app has been built around.
I'm assuming the cookie-based /login stays stable through the next two weeks while the app team ships — we can't change the auth contract mid-flight or every signed-in session breaks.
Targeting end of next week for the mobile login to be done and handed to QA.
